title: That's My King — Dr. S.M. Lockridge
description: Dr. S.M. Lockridge's legendary sermon declaring the supremacy and sufficiency of Jesus Christ — the King of kings.

title: Seeking Allah, Finding Jesus — Nabeel Qureshi
description: Nabeel Qureshi shares his journey from devout Islam to faith in Christ through friendship, evidence, and the work of the Holy Spirit.

title: Brian 'Head' Welch — I Am Second
description: The Korn guitarist shares how Jesus rescued him from a life of addiction and despair, transforming everything.

title: Rosaria Butterfield's Testimony
description: A former tenured professor of English and women's studies, and a lesbian activist, shares how an unexpected friendship and the Scriptures brought her to repentance and faith.

title: Lee Strobel — The Case for Christ
description: Former atheist and investigative journalist Lee Strobel set out to disprove Christianity and instead found the evidence overwhelming.

title: James Tour — Genius Inventor Discovers His Messiah
description: World-renowned nanoscientist Dr. James Tour shares how a Jewish skeptic came to find Jesus as the promised Messiah.

title: Lecrae — I Am Second
description: Hip-hop artist Lecrae shares his journey from a broken home and reckless living to new life in Christ.

title: From Atheist to Christian at Yale — Dr. Paul Lim
description: Dr. Paul Lim, a Yale history professor, recounts how God drew a committed atheist to saving faith through intellectual honesty and grace.

title: Put God First — Denzel Washington
description: Academy Award-winning actor Denzel Washington delivers a powerful commencement address urging graduates to put God first in everything.

title: Chris Pratt's 9 Rules — MTV Awards Speech
description: Chris Pratt uses his MTV acceptance speech to boldly share his faith: 'God is real. God loves you. God wants the best for you.'

title: Bethany Hamilton — I Am Second
description: Professional surfer Bethany Hamilton shares how her faith sustained her after losing her arm in a shark attack and how God's purpose never wavered.

title: Eric Metaxas — I Am Second
description: Bestselling author Eric Metaxas shares his journey from nominal faith to a life-changing encounter with the living God.

title: Clayton Kershaw — God, Just Be with Me
description: MLB pitcher Clayton Kershaw opens up about finding his identity not in baseball success, but in Christ alone.

title: Alex Kendrick — I Am Second
description: Filmmaker Alex Kendrick (War Room, Fireproof) shares his testimony and calling to use film for the glory of God.

title: Why This Atheist Scientist Became a Believing Christian
description: A scientist shares the evidence and encounters that shattered his atheism and led him to faith in Christ.

title: Rosaria Butterfield — Set Free
description: Rosaria Butterfield shares the story of how radical, ordinary hospitality from a pastor and his wife opened the door to the gospel.

title: Anne Wilson — I Am Second
description: Christian music artist Anne Wilson shares how the tragic loss of her brother led her to cling to Christ and find her calling in music.

title: Ryan Ries — I Am Second
description: Ryan Ries shares his testimony of drugs, skateboarding, and the empty pursuit of fame — until Jesus changed everything.
